value: Hi there, thanks for reaching out. I appreciate you checking on this—I want to make sure I'm giving you accurate information, but I don't have visibility into our current route schedules or any planned changes to the SFO-LAS service. Could you share the link to the page you're seeing, or let me know when you noticed this? That'll help me track down the right details for you or connect you with someone who can confirm what's happening with that route.
